mapper.sql: a.id, a.appointment_no, a.user_id, a.card_id, a.department_id, a.doctor_id, a.schedule_id, a.order_id, a.patient_name, a.contact_phone, a.remark, a.status, a.appointment_date, a.time_slot, a.amount, a.pay_time, a.finish_time, a.create_time, a.update_time, d.doctor_name, dp.name as department_name, c.card_no, o.order_no, o.status as order_status
mapper.select: select from appointment_record a left join doctor_info d on a.doctor_id = d.id left join department_info dp on a.department_id = dp.id left join medical_card c on a.card_id = c.id left join payment_order o on a.order_id = o.id where a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into appointment_record(appointment_no, user_id, card_id, department_id, doctor_id, schedule_id, order_id, patient_name, contact_phone, remark, status, appointment_date, time_slot, amount, pay_time, finish_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{appointmentNo}, #{userId}, #{cardId}, #{departmentId}, #{doctorId}, #{scheduleId}, #{orderId}, #{patientName}, #{contactPhone}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{appointmentDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{amount}, #{payTime}, #{finishTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update appointment_record set order_id = #{orderId}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from appointment_record where user_id = #{userId}
select count(*) from appointment_record where user_id = #{userId} and status in (1, 3)
select count(*) from appointment_record where doctor_id = #{doctorId}
select count(*) from appointment_record where doctor_id = #{doctorId} and status = 3

select dp.name as name, count(a.id) as value from appointment_record a left join department_info dp on a.department_id = dp.id where a.status in (1, 3) group by a.department_id, dp.name order by value desc limit 8

select date_format(create_time, '%m-%d') as date, count(*) as count from appointment_record where create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 6 day) group by date(create_time) order by date(create_time)
